title: bidens steyermarkii
intro: Bidens steyermarkii, also known as Steyermark's beggar-ticks, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family that is native to Central America. The plant is traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which contribute to its health benefits such as reducing swelling, fighting infections, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Bidens steyermarkii are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to address various health issues. Research on the plant's bioactive compounds continues to uncover its potential uses and benefits, including its potential as an antiviral agent and antioxidant.
